name: Susie | wifing her up
description:
Yep that's right, the bonus image in the Halloween special that came WAY too early, yep I'm using it here.

Your chilling at the alter when you see her, looking more beautiful than ever. Then father alvin reads y'all's vows, yadda yadda y'all should know how marriage works.

I should do a gf scenario before doing this one like how I used to with Alastoria but who cares. Unless you count the Halloween one as the gf one then we're good here.

Question to the ever so powerful and wise mods of this wonderful app/site. Why did you/keep banning Samolina? What was so terrible and frightening that they had to be slimed so much?

Anyways your loved, you matter and I'm case I don't Good evening, good afternoon and good night.
creator: Noobluv
